description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced PostgreSQL knowledge, covering both familiar and lesser-known features, built-in aggregates, type casting, and constraints. The teaching tone is enthusiastic and encouraging, aiming to teach new tricks and gotchas. It is part 1 of a 2-part series.
Topics: built-in aggregates, type casting, constraints, PostgreSQL gotchas
Audience: PostgreSQL developers and database enthusiasts
